value.title: Rate Limits | Tavily Help Center
value.content: # Rate Limits. Tavily offers two types of rate limits, each specific to the environment associated with your API key. These are the **Development** and **Production** environments. Each environment has its own set of rate limits that dictate how many requests can be made per minute. #### **Development Environment**. * The Development environment is designed for testing and development purposes. It allows up to 100 requests per minute, which is ideal for experimenting with API calls and integrating features without impacting your production environment. #### **Production Environment**. * The Production environment is intended for live applications and services. It offers a higher rate limit of 1,000 requests per minute, allowing you to scale your usage as your application goes live and experiences increased traffic. The crawl endpoint has a separate rate limit that applies to both development and production keys:. | Environment | Requests per minute (RPM) |. What is the Tavily Extract API? What is the Tavily Search API?

Learn how to get and manage your Tavily API Credits. ## ​ Free API Credits. ## Get your free API key. ## ​ Pricing Overview. | **Plan** | **Credits per month** | **Monthly price** | **Price per credit** |. | **Project** | 4,000 | $30 | $0.0075 |. | **Bootstrap** | 15,000 | $100 | $0.0067 |. | **Startup** | 38,000 | $220 | $0.0058 |. | **Growth** | 100,000 | $500 | $0.005 |. | **Pay as you go** | Per usage | $0.008 / Credit | $0.008 |. ## ​ API Credits Costs. ### ​ Tavily Extract. ### ​ Tavily Map. ### ​ Tavily Crawl. ### ​ Tavily Research. | Request Cost Boundaries | model=pro | model=mini |. | Per-request maximum | 250 credits | 110 credits |.

value.title: Pricing - Tavily Help Center
value.content: At Tavily, we offer flexible pricing plans to suit different users, from individual researchers to growing teams and enterprises. Whether you need a free plan to get started or a scalable solution to support your business, we have the right plan for you. * **Who is it for?** New creators and individuals exploring Tavily. * **Who is it for?** Enthusiasts who require more API usage. * **Who is it for?** Small teams that need a scalable search solution. ## **Pay-As-You-Go Plan**. * **Who is it for?** Users who prefer a flexible, usage-based model. If you're just getting started, the **Researcher (Free) plan** is perfect for exploring Tavily’s capabilities. If you require more frequent API usage, the **Project, Bootstrap, Startup, or Growth plans** offer increasing levels of resources. Businesses and teams needing flexibility may prefer the **Pay-As-You-Go** model, while enterprises can work with us to build a **custom solution** that fits their needs. How to Set a Limit for Pay as You Go Option?
